overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night. The player moves along wet sidewalks and streets, passing under overpasses and through intersections with neon-lit billboards and modern skyscrapers. Heavy rain and artificial lighting create a moody, atmospheric environment typical of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city sidewalk with street lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along wet sidewalk next to road barriers, passing a tall street lamp in the heavy rain

entered.detail: tall modern street lamp illuminating the rain and wet pavement
traffic signal showing red light mounted on black pole
black metal barriers separating sidewalk from the road
concrete elevated highway structure spanning across the street ahead
tall dark building with illuminated windows rising above the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy night in a cyberpunk city. The camera walks along a wet concrete sidewalk, passing a bright street lamp and traffic light. Metal guardrails line the right side separating the walkway from the empty road, while an overpass looms ahead in the distance.

events.description: entering covered area beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass with street lights illuminating the right side of the path

entered.detail: tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark rainy sky
large illuminated advertisement screens with colorful neon displays
series of modern street lamps creating a line of light along the road

segments.scene_description: Moving under the overpass, the environment becomes more enclosed and sheltered from the rain. The concrete structure spans overhead while digital billboards become visible on the right. Street lights create a rhythmic pattern of illumination along the wet pavement.

events.description: exiting covered overpass area into open intersection with wider visibility
traffic light changes from red to green while approaching the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt street at the intersection, moving toward the traffic lights and digital displays

entered.detail: street sign indicating Pacifica direction mounted above the road
overhead traffic signals showing red then changing to green
raised concrete divider with small plants separating road lanes

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into an open intersection, the scene reveals large digital billboards and traffic infrastructure. The camera crosses the wet asphalt as the traffic light changes from red to green, with the road sign for Pacifica visible overhead.

events.description: turning right at the street corner and tilting camera upward to look at the skyscraper

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner and looking up at the tall building facade

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with glass and steel facade rising into the night sky
illuminated digital advertisement displays mounted on the building exterior

segments.scene_description: At the street corner, the camera turns right and tilts upward to reveal a towering modern skyscraper. The building's glass facade and illuminated advertisement screens dominate the view as the camera looks up toward the rainy night sky, ending the walk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rain-slicked urban corridor that transitions from a sheltered walkway into a vast, neon-lit intersection. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk beside metal guardrails, moving past a bright street lamp toward a looming overpass in the distance. As the camera passes under the concrete structure, the environment becomes more enclosed and sheltered, with rhythmic street lighting reflecting off the pavement and digital billboards appearing on the right. The scene then opens into a wide intersection where the camera crosses the wet asphalt under a Pacifica road sign just as the traffic light shifts from red to green. Finally, the camera turns at the street corner and tilts upward, shifting the focus from the ground to the towering glass facade and illuminated screens of a modern skyscraper against the rainy night sky.
